beIN SPORTS 8.desc_ar: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Strasbourg have beaten Lens more often than any other opponent in their Ligue 1 history, however, they have only won one of their last seven top-flight games against Lens. beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Rennes vs Toulouse - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 24ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Rennes have won 37 Ligue 1 games against Toulouse, only managing more top-flight wins against Strasbourg. However, Rennes are currently on a six-game winless run against Toulouse in the top-flight. Rennes have lost just 16% of their home games against Toulouse in Ligue 1, their lowest percentage against an opponent they have faced at least 25 times at home. However, Rennes have been beaten in their two most recent such encounters.
